# [network-request] Skimlinks

**Network name:** Skimlinks

**Slug:** `skimlinks`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://hub.skimlinks.com/

**API documentation URL:** https://developers.skimlinks.com/

**Account requirements:** Publisher account with content monetisation
approved. API access is granted on request once the publisher has a working
site integration; no separate tier or revenue threshold beyond the standard
content review.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** Skimlinks sits across thousands of
merchants without per-merchant approval, which makes it the typical fallback
network for content-heavy publishers. Surfacing its earnings, programmes, and
transactions alongside Awin/CJ/Impact/Rakuten would close the most common
"which network covers this merchant" question.
